race_meta.race_name: DragonBet The Roar Before BOG At Cheltenham Novices' Handicap Chase

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner rap soul (fr) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Rap Soul with 53.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Rap Soul > Carpe Diem, but actual result was Rap Soul (FR) > Lunar Ocean (IRE). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
